description_long: This object consists of two slender, branching stems bearing several heart-shaped leaves and two prominent white flowers. The leaves are mostly green with some reddish-brown mottling, and they have a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The flowers each have four white petals arranged around a central, elongated yellowish spike (spadix), giving them a simple yet elegant appearance. The stems are thin, green to reddish, and appear flexible, supporting the leaves and flowers at varying heights. The overall structure is delicate, with the flowers positioned above or among the leaves. This plant is typical of urban parks, gardens, or roadside green spaces, adding a touch of natural beauty to its surroundings.
description: A delicate plant with two thin stems, heart-shaped green and reddish leaves, and two white-petaled flowers with yellowish central spikes. The flowers and leaves are arranged at different heights, giving a natural, airy appearance.
description_view_0: Two stems with heart-shaped leaves and two white flowers are visible, with the flowers and leaves clearly separated and the reddish mottling on the leaves prominent.
description_view_1: The stems and leaves are seen edge-on, making the plant appear narrower; one flower is more prominent, and the color variation in the leaves is visible.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed from the opposite side, showing the backs of the leaves and the flowers, with the stems and leaf arrangement more apparent.
description_view_3: A mostly vertical view, highlighting the height of the stems and the alignment of the flowers and leaves along the main axis.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a simple, radial configuration with four distinct, separate petals per flower, evenly spaced around the central spadix. The arrangement is symmetrical and does not show overlapping or layering.
